allowed_guarded_actions.instruction: Hold the eyelids apart and flush the eyes continuously with running water.
Continue flushing for at least 15 minutes or until a doctor or poison center tells you to stop.

do_not_do.instruction: Do not stop flushing early without medical direction.

escalation.instruction: Seek immediate medical attention after flushing starts.

immediate_actions.instruction: Buka kelopak mata dan bilas mata secara berterusan dengan air mengalir.
Teruskan membilas selama sekurang-kurangnya 15 minit atau sehingga doktor atau pusat racun mengarahkan anda berhenti.

do_not_do.instruction: Jangan berhenti membilas lebih awal tanpa arahan perubatan.

escalate_now.instruction: Dapatkan rawatan perubatan segera selepas proses membilas bermula.
escalate_now.reason: Pendedahan bahan kimia pada mata memerlukan penilaian profesional segera.
